messages.content: I hve 10 book in a room, i read 3 of them..how many book left in the room?
After reading 3 books, there are 7 books remaining in the room.
I hve 10 book in a room, i read 3 of them..how many book are physically left in the room?
The number of books physically left in the room after reading 3 of them is 7.
